arts.ttl: Paul Warne reveals Derby County transfer truth as David Clowes green lights deal
arts.sum: Asked about the transfer state of play ahead of Derby’s Championship clash with Cardiff City on Saturday (3pm), Warne said: “I think we’re progressing really well. Amid links to Fraulo, Warne continued: “We do have foreign targets, whether we press on any of them I don’t know.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Santiago Gimenez to AC Milan, Yeremay Hernandez to Dortmund, Ollie Tanner to the Premier League
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Santiago Gimenez to AC Milan, Yeremay Hernandez to Dortmund, Ollie Tanner to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Preview: Cardiff City vs. Derby County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Cardiff City and Derby County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

We’ve taken positives from the game and the performance, but we need to make sure we go again on Saturday. They will obviously want to get one back on us for what we did to them earlier in the season, but we’ve got to make sure we’re focused, prepared, and we’ll be ready.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne warns against Derby County 'destiny' doom as he makes psychological admission
arts.sum: Warne is also positive about the energy levels of his players before the Cardiff City Stadium clash, but admits they are in need of a psychological boost amid their losing run. “So, I think it will be two teams, needing a win, and wanting a win.
